div.div:
Using r.fill.dir from GRASS
Needs to be run multiple times until all
problems are resolved.
Quite slow even for a single run
Could be improved by parallelized algorithm Priority Flood Algorithm(Barnes, 2014).

div.div:
Merge smaller MWS with downstream or upstream MWS.
Iterative algorithm.
Threshold = 500 ha.
Some MWS could not be merged.
Quite slow. Should we use Rust to write this logic?

switch.text: Merge smaller MWS with downstream or upstream MWS....
